justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation, correctly identifying dates and afternoon timeframes.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same unhelpful alternatives (morning appointments, online/phone consultations) despite the user explicitly rejecting them multiple times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made numerous redundant API calls by re-checking entire months for afternoon slots even after having already confirmed no availability for those periods.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer any viable alternatives or escalate the issue effectively, leading to repetitive and unproductive turns.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent was unable to find any in-branch afternoon mortgage appointments for seven months, and its recovery strategy was ineffective as it kept offering options the user had already rejected.
